raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "lighter_box",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The lighter box is the upper box in the stack, fully exposed on its vertical sides, with at least 15 cm clearance around it so both end-effectors can approach from the left and right without touching the darker box or table edge.",
    "Postcondition": "The lighter box is firmly held between the two end-effectors, lifted a few centimeters above the darker box, leaving the darker box unobstructed on the tabletop."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "clear_left_area_of_table",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the lighter box and the left area of the table is free of objects, providing enough space (30 cm × 30 cm) for safe placement.",
    "Postcondition": "The lighter box is placed flat on the left side of the table, released by the end-effectors, and no longer obstructs access to the darker box."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "darker_box",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The darker box is now isolated on the table surface with unobstructed lateral access for both arms; sufficient overhead clearance exists to lift the box.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is securely held between the two end-effectors and lifted off the table, completing the task of picking up the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The lighter box is the upper box in the stack, fully exposed on its vertical sides, with at least 15 cm clearance around it so both end-effectors can approach from the left and right without touching the darker box or table edge.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The lighter box is firmly held between the two end-effectors, lifted a few centimeters above the darker box, leaving the darker box unobstructed on the tabletop.

parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the lighter box and the left area of the table is free of objects, providing enough space (30 cm × 30 cm) for safe placement.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The lighter box is placed flat on the left side of the table, released by the end-effectors, and no longer obstructs access to the darker box.

parsed_json.Precondition: The darker box is now isolated on the table surface with unobstructed lateral access for both arms; sufficient overhead clearance exists to lift the box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is securely held between the two end-effectors and lifted off the table, completing the task of picking up the darker box.
